prestazioni: Engine swap to a Maserati AM590 3.0L V6 (engine code: *AM590*), retaining the original Maserati-designed block but upgrading internals with forged Mahle pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons for 8,500 RPM reliability. Pair with a custom-built Garrett GT35R turbo (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate to target 450whp on 93 octane with a Motec M150 ECU managing fueling via ID1000x injectors and a Radium Engineering fuel surge tank.

Full drivetrain reinforcement starting with a Quaife ATB differential (part #QDF7Z) in the original Chrysler 8.25" rear end, paired with a Tilton twin-disc clutch (6.5" diameter) and a custom aluminum flywheel from Fidanza. Replace the factory half-shafts with custom CV axles from The Driveshaft Shop (3.5" chromoly shafts) to handle increased torque, and upgrade the transmission mounts to solid polyurethane units from Energy Suspension (part #3.1111R).

Suspension overhaul using a custom Öhlins Road & Track coilover kit (part #DFV 2240) with 8-position adjustable damping, paired with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm springs for a 1.5" drop. Replace the factory sway bars with Addco 1.25" front and 1.125" rear bars (part #954 for front, #955 for rear), and install spherical bearing control arm bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0114K) to eliminate compliance. Braking is upgraded to a Brembo GT 6-piston front kit (355mm rotors, part #1N3.9505.10) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and a Wilwood master cylinder (part #260-11176) for bias adjustment.
estetica: Full carbon fiber body conversion using a custom Rocket Bunny widebody kit (designed specifically for the TC by Maserati, part #RB-CHRYTC-01) with aggressive front canards, extended rear fenders, and a ducktail spoiler. Replace the factory hood with a vented carbon fiber unit from Seibon (part #CF-CHRTCH-01) featuring dual NACA ducts for intercooler airflow, and install a custom front splitter from APR Performance (part #SPL-001) with adjustable dive planes.

Wheel setup consists of custom 18x9.5" ET20 front and 18x11" ET15 rear BBS LM-R wheels (gold finish, part #LM-R 1895203 and #LM-R 1811153) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 295/35/18 rear). Fender flares are rolled and pulled to accommodate the wider track, with custom aluminum fender liners from Cusco (part #683 540 A) to protect the engine bay.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a full Alcantara retrim by Katzkin, including Recaro SRD-LW seats (part #SRD-LW-F) with custom Maserati tricolor stitching, a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, part #0111200113), and a digital dash from AIM MXS Strada (part #1.20.02) integrated into the factory gauge cluster. Replace the factory shifter with a short-throw unit from B&M (part #80775) and add a custom aluminum shift knob from NRG Innovations (part #SK-200AL).
